# ApiKey

> Hashed API key for programmatic access

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| key | string | yes | - | SHA-256 hashed key (never store plaintext) |
| prefix | string | yes | - | First 8 chars of key for display |
| name | string | yes | - | Human-readable key name |
| organizationId | uuid | yes | - | Owning organization |
| userId | uuid | yes | - | User who created the key |
| scopes | json | yes | ["ingest","read"] | Allowed scopes, e.g. ["ingest","read","admin"] |
| expiresAt | date | yes | - | Key expiration timestamp |
| lastUsedAt | date | yes | - | Last time the key was used |
| status | active \| revoked | yes | active | Key status |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/api-key` — List all
- `POST /api/api-key` — Create
- `GET /api/api-key/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/api-key/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/api-key/:id` — Delete
